criteria.evidence: Senior backend engineer, 8 years, focused on high-throughput payments infrastructure — strongest signal is owning a double-entry ledger at ~9M transactions/day with measurable latency, reliability, and correctness wins.
criteria.reason: One sentence; names ~8 yrs + backend/payments domain + the real strongest signal (ledger / correctness at scale). Exactly matches the expectation and traces to persona lines 6, 16.

criteria.evidence: Evidence table captures 9M txns/day, p99 410→95ms, Sev2s 6/quarter→0, double-charges ~120/mo→<5/mo, gateway CPU ~35%, MTTR ~90→~25 min, 30+ internal services.
criteria.reason: Every load-bearing number from the expectations file is present and correct. Nothing major dropped; even the secondary roles (Brightwater, Orchard) are inventoried with their real scope.

criteria.evidence: Correctness-critical payments systems — backed by the ledger, idempotency, and reconciliation work at Cascade Pay (double-charges 120/mo → <5/mo). ... Setting technical direction with buy-in — backed by the ledger redesign design doc + load test that won over two staff engineers.
criteria.reason: Every strength cites a specific experience with a number or concrete artifact. No free-floating adjectives (no 'great engineer'). Each strength maps to a JD requirement.

criteria.evidence: Open questions: Mentorship: 4 engineers mentored is stated, but there is no quantified outcome — confirm... Orchard Labs billing webhook pipeline: no metric attached... which language(s) are interview-ready for live coding...
criteria.reason: Open questions are minor and genuine — they target the two genuinely unquantified items (mentorship, webhook) and ask which language is coding-ready rather than inventing facts. It did NOT manufacture missing info where the rich résumé has it. Matches expectation that open questions should be minor.

criteria.evidence: All metrics (9M tx/day, 410→95ms, 6→0 Sev2s, 120→<5/mo, 35% CPU, 90→25 min, 30+ services, 4 engineers, 3 yrs K8s) cross-checked against persona lines 6,16,19,21,22,25,26,27,33,46. The two unquantified rows are explicitly flagged ⚠️ needs a number rather than invented.
criteria.reason: Zero fabrication. Every number traces to the persona. Where the persona has no number (mentorship outcome, billing webhook impact), the artifact correctly marks ⚠️ instead of inventing one — model honest behavior.
